---
title: "Your Article Title"
author: "Your Name"
date: 2026-06-29
type: article
category: "Engineering"
tags: [tag1, tag2, tag3]
estimated_read_time: 10
is_own_work: true
# gists are optional — run: npm run gists -- content/articles/this-file.qmd
# gists:
#   quick: ""
#   medium: ""
#   full: ""
---

Write your article content here in standard Markdown.

## Section Heading

Your content...

## Another Section

More content...
